items.name_en: New red color in stock
items.name_cn:
New red color in stock
Reproduction Miu Miu 5BB142, Miu's new bowling bag, officially promoted, this year's absolute hit🔥 style. Top-grade imported calfskin, Miu's unique Matelasse pattern. Exquisite, three-dimensional, and structured bag body. Front engraved logo echoes the leather color. Removable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap. Cotton satin lining, with zippered pocket. Many celebrities and influencers have the same style. Size: 22X10.5X7.5Cm, with original packaging

items.name_en: New Release 🆕Chanel 25s Spring/Summer
items.name_cn:
New Release 🆕Chanel 25s Spring/Summer
Cross-handle Mini Kelly Black
Purchased from the counter for 31,800 RMB~
Bestseller Reissue 🔥 New version Mini Kelly horizontal
When Chanel's legendary aesthetics meet exquisite craftsmanship,
this cross-chain handle Mini Kelly was born.
With a unique design, it has an elegant handbag feel,
and can be casually crossbody, unlocking diverse fashion looks~
Hardware: Thick-plated 14k pale gold clasp
Material: Impala "Three Sheep" small ball pattern
Dimensions: 10*18*4.5 cm

items.name_en: New SERPENTI ELLIPSE Large Crossbody Bag
items.name_cn:
New SERPENTI ELLIPSE Large Crossbody Bag
Add a touch of fashion to the SERPENTI FOREVER world with its unique shape, iconic details, and versatile charm.
Crafted from pink calfskin, this daily bag features urban grained calfskin in the center and smooth calfskin on the sides, accented with gold-plated brass fittings. The charming classic snake head is centered with black scales and red enamel eyes, with a magnetic snap concealed on the front.
Features a single compartment, adjustable chain and leather shoulder strap, and a detachable leather handle, allowing it to be worn crossbody or as a classic shoulder bag. Practical top zipper with an internal pocket, an external pocket on the back, and a BVLGARI metal logo.
Model: 291636
Dimensions: 25.5×25×5.5 cm

specs.rawTitle:

Features a single compartment, adjustable chain and leather shoulder strap, and a detachable leather handle, allowing it to be worn crossbody or as a classic shoulder bag. Practical top zipper with an internal pocket, an external pocket on the back, and a BVLGARI metal logo.
